system.description: When an object is used to hurt or embarrass you (a bullet, a bucket of paint, a sticky note, etc.) roll [quality].

outcomes.success: the object changes to something harmless or flattering instead (the bullet becomes a foam dart, the paint becomes water and you look amazing in a wet t-shirt, the message on the sticky note advertises an impressive fact about you, etc.) Any Harm that would be dealt is negated, and any intended embarrassment backfires on the wielder.
outcomes.sixplus3s: you keep the original object or intended effect within you, and can release it at any time. Write down what you transformed and erase it later to turn something harmless or flattering back into what you kept. (A bottle of juice is suddenly full of paint, a flicked straw becomes a fired bullet in the air, etc.)
outcomes.spend3s:
the object remains in
its original hurt- or embarrassment-
causing form, and your hands transform
into something gentle, imprecise,
and useless for violence. They’ll
return to normal after about a day.

improvement.question: If I want something too expensive...

answer2.text: I find something I already have that's close enough.
